sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52833" key="kalo/pous2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλό-πους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n52833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful feet</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>: but</sense> </entryFree>
